IPDA_Data_Ranges.purpose: Identify algorithmic liquidity pools and fair value equilibrium.
IPDA_Data_Ranges.action: Mark highs/lows of these ranges. Sweeps of these levels are high probability reversal triggers.

SMT_Divergence.logic: If EUR makes HH but GBP fails (making LH), it is a Bearish SMT (Institutional Distribution).

MMXM_Models.MMBM: Original Consolidation -> Engineering Liquidity -> SMR (Smart Money Reversal) -> Distribution to original range.
MMXM_Models.SMR_Trigger: HTF PD Array tap + LFT MSS with displacement.

Standard_Deviation_Projections.application: Project from the manipulation leg (leg before SMR) to find high-probability reversal targets.

Weekly_Profiles.Classic_Tuesday: Weekly High/Low forms by Tuesday London or NY AM.
Weekly_Profiles.Midweek_Reversal: Trend reversal on Wednesday after tapping HTF POI.
Weekly_Profiles.Seek_and_Destroy: Range-bound week clearing both sides before big move.

V16_Sovereign_Rules.Liquidity_Void: Price returns to fill 80% of an impulsive candle void.
V16_Sovereign_Rules.Quarterly_Theory: Market shifts trends every 3 months (Quarterly Shifts). Monitor first 2 weeks of the quarter.
